detail.description: Charles McAdoo lines out to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.
Charles McAdoo flies out to right fielder Jasson Domínguez.
Charles McAdoo flies out to right fielder Jasson Domínguez.
Charles McAdoo pops out to first baseman Ben Rice in foul territory.
Charles McAdoo grounds out, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice.
Charles McAdoo lines out to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.
Charles McAdoo singles on a ground ball to third baseman Ryan McMahon. Ernie Clement to 3rd. Yohendrick Piñango to 2nd.
Charles McAdoo flies out to right fielder Adolis García.
Charles McAdoo grounds out, second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper.
Charles McAdoo singles on a line drive to left fielder Taylor Ward.

Charles McAdoo grounds into a force out, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to second baseman Jackson Holliday. Ernie Clement scores. Yohendrick Piñango out at 2nd. Charles McAdoo to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Jackson Holliday.
Charles McAdoo flies out sharply to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Charles McAdoo grounds into a double play, second baseman Jackson Holliday to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Jesús Sánchez out at 2nd. Charles McAdoo out at 1st.
Charles McAdoo grounds out, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso.
Charles McAdoo homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field. Daulton Varsho scores.
Charles McAdoo pops out to first baseman Pete Alonso in foul territory.
Charles McAdoo grounds into a force out, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to second baseman Ozzie Albies. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 2nd. Charles McAdoo to 1st.
Charles McAdoo singles on a ground ball to center fielder Michael Harris II. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Kazuma Okamoto to 2nd.
Charles McAdoo pops out to second baseman Nico Hoerner in foul territory.
